title: Invoice Template Module
summary: Small invoice-template module with a calculator, downloadable template, and reuse-friendly install path for the target query 'how to use invoice template'.

module_manifest.module_task: help a small_business user create and reuse an invoice template quickly

entries.title: How To Use Invoice Template
entries.first_action: Open the page, enter subtotal/tax/discussion terms, and click Generate invoice estimate.
entries.smoke_test: Fill amount = 1000, tax = 10, discount = 0, terms = 30, then verify Due Amount and Due Date render in one screen and click Download template.
entries.proof_signal: Local-first template CSV output, explicit completion event, save intent event, and checkout click signal without account login.
entries.fallback: Use FreshBooks or Square invoice templates linked in the official sources if you need full billing platform automation.
entries.license: CC0 equivalent sample utility fields, no proprietary formulas.
entries.test_command:
python - <<'PY'
import csv
with open('site/how-to-use-invoice-template/template/invoice-template.csv', newline='') as f:
    rows = list(csv.reader(f))
print('rows', len(rows))
PY

fallback: If the page fails to load, use official sources directly from the listed invoice tool references.
